title: SQLite Database Backend
content: All server-side persistence (download history, library sync config, sync run history, and failed file tracking) has been migrated from JSON files to a SQLite database powered by better-sqlite3. This brings faster queries, proper relational data (per-track metadata stored for album downloads), and atomic transactions. Existing JSON data is automatically imported on first startup. The Docker image now uses Debian Bookworm for native addon support. Configure the database location with SAAVN_DB_PATH (defaults to /data/saavn-dl.db in Docker).

title: Download History
content: saavn-dl now tracks everything you download! A new History page (clock icon in the footer) shows all your past downloads with album art, quality, and timestamps. Search results display a green checkmark on tracks and albums you've already downloaded. History is persisted server-side when self-hosted, or in your browser's localStorage on static deployments. Filter by tracks or albums, remove individual entries, or clear all.

title: Background Download Queue
content: Downloads no longer block the UI! You can now queue multiple songs and albums for background download. A floating indicator in the top-right shows what's downloading, and clicking it opens a panel to view, manage, retry, or remove downloads. Keep searching and browsing while your music downloads in the background.

title: Artist Search + Album Browsing
content: You can now search for artists by name! A new "Artists" tab in the search bar lets you find any artist, view their full discography (albums, singles, and latest releases), and click through to download any album. The artist page shows a profile card with listener count and tabbed navigation between albums, singles, and latest releases.

title: Navidrome Compatibility + Album Metadata Editor
content: Three improvements in this update: 1) Fixed a download failure caused by the proxy forwarding incomplete upstream responses — downloads are now buffered with automatic retry on transient failures. 2) You can now edit metadata per-track in the album view — expand any track and click "Edit Meta" before downloading. 3) Multi-artist album detection for Navidrome — saavn-dl now detects albums with tracks by different artists and offers to set a unified Album Artist tag so your music server keeps the album grouped as one entry.

title: Self-Hosted: Docker, VPN Proxy & Library Sync
content: Major self-hosting update! saavn-dl now ships with a Dockerfile (multi-stage Node 20 build), a server-side proxy that routes all audio/cover fetches through the host network (perfect for Gluetun/WireGuard VPN setups), and a full Library Sync system — stage downloads on a fast SSD and sync to your NAS on a configurable cron schedule with retry logic. Set SAAVN_LIBRARY_PATH and SAAVN_MUSIC_PATH to enable.

title: Metadata Editor!
content: JioSaavn metadata are often incorrect. That's why saavn-dl now has a built-in metadata editor! You can now edit song metadata (title, artist, album, year, genre) before downloading. This allows you to customize the metadata of your downloaded songs according to your preferences.

title: Added Album Download Support!
content: saavn-dl now supports full album downloads! You can search albums or paste JioSaavn album links and browse the complete tracklist. Download individual tracks from an album, or grab the entire album as a ZIP or as individual files with embedded metadata and cover art.

title: Search Feature Is Here!
content: The search feature is here! You can now search songs directly in saavn-dl. Simply type the song name in the search bar and hit enter. No more need to copy links from jiosaavn.com. You can still paste links if you are unable to find the song in search results.

title: Search Feature Coming Soon!
content: I know that many users outside India are facing issues accessing jiosaavn.com because JioSaavn is only available in India. Search feature coming soon so you can search songs directly here. Quick solution for now: Use a VPN set to India to access jiosaavn.com and copy links from there.

title: FFMpeg Update
content: FFMpeg issue fixed! Metadata loading and embedding should now work without any issues.

title: Welcome to saavn-dl!
content: saavn-dl is a browser-based JioSaavn downloader with ffmpeg-powered metadata embedding. Paste any JioSaavn song URL, pick your quality (up to 320 kbps), and download with full metadata and cover art baked in.
